query: SELECT pn.number, pn.serviceExternalId, s.connectionId, s.supplierName, s.customerName FROM phone_numbers pn LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId WHERE pn.serviceExternalId != '' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT pn.number, pn.serviceExternalId, s.connectionId, s.supplierName, s.customerName FROM phone_numbers pn LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId WHERE pn.serviceExternalId != '' LIMIT 5;
